acceptance_criteria: Workbook contains Inputs, Assumptions, CrewSchedule, CapacityPlan, RestorationTimeline, SLA_Credit, ChangeLog, Manifest/README sheets.
No hard-coded times/capacities in computed fields; all reference Inputs.
SLA_Credit uses 15-minute quantization and explicit acceptance flags; two scenarios presented.
Brief includes ISO 8601 UTC timestamps, finalized FCC/NORS triggers, next-bridge time/owners, and an alternatives table.
extra_model_fields.risk_of_regression_notes: Refactoring formulas may introduce reference errors; mitigate with named ranges and a Manifest/README. Ensure date-sensitive TEXT() formatting uses mm for minutes and double-quoted 'Z'.
test_plan: Shift outage_start by +30 minutes in Inputs; verify all timestamps shift consistently and credits recompute.
Flip BANK-C_partial_accepted from FALSE to TRUE; verify 40% reduction applies only in accepted scenario.
Reduce Ring-B spare capacity below 120G; confirm CapacityPlan flags oversubscription and Timeline adjusts CLOUD-D partial.
Delay C2 clearance by +30 minutes; verify S2 splicing shifts and dependent restorations move accordingly.
Export a report of ISO timestamps from Timeline and cross-check against the updated brief.

priority_items: {'rubric_item_id': 'ri_1', 'status': 'fail', 'notes': 'Inputs/Assumptions parameterization and downstream formula references not verifiable.'}
{'rubric_item_id': 'ri_2', 'status': 'weak_pass', 'notes': 'Dependencies implied in brief but not machine-verifiable; add explicit predecessors and no-overlap checks.'}
{'rubric_item_id': 'ri_3', 'status': 'pass', 'notes': 'Allocations appear policy-compliant and not oversubscribed; tie readiness to schedule in workbook.'}
{'rubric_item_id': 'ri_4', 'status': 'weak_pass', 'notes': 'Timeline consistency is plausible; derive all timestamps from outage_start with formulas and ISO formatting.'}
{'rubric_item_id': 'ri_5', 'status': 'fail', 'notes': 'Partial-service credit reduction applied on assumed acceptance; must be controlled by explicit flags with 15-minute quantization.'}
{'rubric_item_id': 'ri_6', 'status': 'pass', 'notes': 'Prioritization aligns with policy (life-safety first, microwave limited to BANK-C).'}
{'rubric_item_id': 'ri_7', 'status': 'weak_pass', 'notes': 'Brief is clear but missing full ISO timestamps and complete FCC/NORS section.'}
{'rubric_item_id': 'ri_8', 'status': 'fail', 'notes': 'Formulas and ChangeLog unverified; add ChangeLog and ensure all computed fields reference Inputs.'}

acceptance_criteria: Workbook contains Inputs, Assumptions, CrewSchedule, CapacityPlan, RestorationTimeline, SLA_Credit, ChangeLog, Manifest/README sheets.
No hard-coded times/capacities in computed fields; all reference Inputs.
SLA_Credit uses 15-minute quantization and explicit acceptance flags; two scenarios presented.
Brief includes ISO 8601 UTC timestamps, finalized FCC/NORS triggers, next-bridge time/owners, and an alternatives table.
extra_model_fields.risk_of_regression_notes: Refactoring formulas may introduce reference errors; mitigate with named ranges and a Manifest/README. Ensure date-sensitive TEXT() formatting uses mm for minutes and double-quoted 'Z'.
test_plan: Shift outage_start by +30 minutes in Inputs; verify all timestamps shift consistently and credits recompute.
Flip BANK-C_partial_accepted from FALSE to TRUE; verify 40% reduction applies only in accepted scenario.
Reduce Ring-B spare capacity below 120G; confirm CapacityPlan flags oversubscription and Timeline adjusts CLOUD-D partial.
Delay C2 clearance by +30 minutes; verify S2 splicing shifts and dependent restorations move accordingly.
Export a report of ISO timestamps from Timeline and cross-check against the updated brief.

planned_changes.change: Create Inputs sheet with outage_start (UTC), crew travel/setup/splice/test durations, capacity pools (N1-N5 spare 70G, microwave 20G, DWDM 800G, Ring-B spare 120G), resource readiness latencies, and policy toggles (partial_reduction_pct=0.4, bank_microwave_allowed=TRUE).
planned_changes.rationale: Centralize parameters and enable formula-driven recomputation.
planned_changes.success_criteria: No hard-coded times/capacities in downstream sheets; changing outage_start shifts all timelines.

planned_changes.change: Add Assumptions sheet with per-customer acceptance flags (e.g., BANK-C_partial_accepted, CLOUD-D_partial_accepted) default FALSE and notes on policy.
planned_changes.rationale: Ensure partial-service credits only reduce when explicitly accepted.
planned_changes.success_criteria: Setting a flag toggles the 40% reduction in SLA_Credit and reflected totals.

planned_changes.change: Implement CrewSchedule with TaskID, Crew, Start, End, PredID; formula-derived times from outage_start; enforce C2 clearance predecessor before any C2 splicing/testing; add per-crew overlap validation.
planned_changes.rationale: Make dependencies explicit and machine-verifiable.
planned_changes.success_criteria: Predecessor logic prevents C2 splicing before clearance; overlap check flags any double-booking.

planned_changes.change: Refactor CapacityPlan to tie resource readiness to CrewSchedule milestones; sum allocations and assert Allocated <= Capacity; include protection/policy checks per path.
planned_changes.rationale: Prevent oversubscription and ensure policy compliance is visible.
planned_changes.success_criteria: All resources pass readiness and capacity checks; violations visibly flagged.

planned_changes.change: Build RestorationTimeline deriving earliest degraded/full restoration per customer using MIN over eligible resources, constrained by readiness and acceptance flags for partial paths.
planned_changes.rationale: Deterministic, formula-driven earliest restoration times.
planned_changes.success_criteria: Earliest times adjust correctly when Inputs durations or flags change.

planned_changes.change: Implement SLA_Credit with 15-minute quantization and thresholds using CEILING/CEILING.MATH and MAX(0, ...); compute conservative and accepted scenarios; apply partial_reduction_pct only if acceptance=TRUE.
planned_changes.rationale: Accurate credit computation aligned with policy.
planned_changes.success_criteria: Block counts match expected examples (e.g., BANK-C 46 blocks) and toggle correctly with acceptance flags.

planned_changes.change: Add ChangeLog (ISO 8601 UTC, author/role, summary) and Manifest (sheet list, purposes, key formula anchors).
planned_changes.rationale: Provide auditability and assist automated graders unable to open XLSX fully.
planned_changes.success_criteria: ChangeLog has at least one entry for this revision; Manifest lists sheets and key formulas.

planned_changes.change: Include README/Overview sheet documenting where to find acceptance toggles, capacity checks, and how timestamps are derived and formatted.
planned_changes.rationale: Improve transparency and reviewability.
planned_changes.success_criteria: README references exact sheet/tab and cell ranges for core logic.

planned_changes.change: Update NOC brief to use full ISO 8601 UTC timestamps with dates; replace 'acceptance assumed' with explicit acceptance status or present both exposure scenarios; finalize FCC/NORS trigger text and add next-bridge time and owners.
planned_changes.rationale: Clarity, policy compliance, and customer-facing precision.
planned_changes.success_criteria: All times show YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ; FCC/NORS section complete; exposure table reflects conservative vs accepted cases.

planned_changes.change: Add an Alternatives and Tradeoffs section in the brief comparing S2 reassignment vs holding on C2, showing impacts on life-safety and credits.
planned_changes.rationale: Document rationale for prioritization decisions.
planned_changes.success_criteria: Table shows at least two options with quantified deltas on outage minutes and credits.

raw_llm_output.revision_reason: Address missing explicit parameterization and acceptance controls, enforce formula-driven 15-minute quantization and schedule-capacity linkages, add ChangeLog/Manifest, and correct brief formatting and policy sections.

raw_model_output.revision_reason: Address missing explicit parameterization and acceptance controls, enforce formula-driven 15-minute quantization and schedule-capacity linkages, add ChangeLog/Manifest, and correct brief formatting and policy sections.

metadata_json.revision_goal: Deliverables are present and the NOC brief is coherent, but the workbook's parameterization, acceptance toggles, formula linkages, and change log cannot be verified. Credits apply a partial-service reduction based on assumed acceptance, which conflicts with policy requiring explicit acceptance flags. Timestamps in the brief are UTC but often omit dates and full ISO 8601 format. Add a clearly referenced Inputs/Assumptions model, enforce crew/task dependencies, tie capacity readiness to schedule milestones, implement 15-minute quantization formulas, and include a ChangeLog. Update the brief to reflect ISO timestamps, explicit acceptance status, and finalized FCC/NORS triggers.
